summary: Docker Compose build and up succeeded on allocated dynamic ports; backend and Postgres are healthy and frontend is running.
Runtime proof checked backend package/tests, frontend install/build, quality score, Docker deployment state, Playwright result, backend health endpoint, and frontend URL.
Runtime proof passed. Backend health returned UP, frontend URL returned HTTP 200, Docker services were running, quality score was 9.2, and Playwright passed 3/3 tests.
